title: CAT (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1995
description: CAT (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1995
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/94 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 30] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JANUARY 20, 1995/PAUSA 30, 1916 168 GI/95 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF TNDIA : KXTRAORDINAKY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] -- 2 of 4 -- 3 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Departnunt of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th January, 1995 G.S.R. 39(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred hy sub-section ( I ) and clause (c) of sub-section (2) of section 35 read with section 36A of the Ad- ministrative Tribunals Act, 1985 13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules fun iher to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chair- man and Members) Rules, 1985, namisiy :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrafive Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chair- man, and Members) Amendment Rules, 1995. (2) They shall be demmed to have come into force on the 31st day of March, 1989. 2. In the Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1985 in rule 8,, for sub-rule (2), the followingsub-rule shall be substituted, namely :— "(2) Pension under sub-rule (1) shall be calculated at the rate of rupees one thousand four hundred and fifty per annum for each completed year of service: Provided that the aggregate amount of pension payable under this rule together with the amount of any pension including commuted portion of pension, if any, drawn or entitled to be drawn while holding office in the Tribunal shall not exceed the maximum amount of pension prescribed for a judge of the High Court." EXPLANATION MEMORANDUM The Central Government has decided to rtvise the Pension of Members of Central Administrative Tribunal with effect from 31-3-1989, that is ,the date from which pension admissible to Chairman and Vice-Chairmen of the Central Administrative Tribunal has been revised. The Central Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chair- man and Members) Rules, 1985 are being amended accordingly, with retros- pective effect, i.e. on and from the 31st March, 1989. -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 2, It is certified thajti no Member of the Central Administrative Tribunal is likely to be affected adversely by this notification being given retrospective effect. [No. A-12018|10|90-AT] i SMT. SARITA PRASAD, Jt. Secy. Footnote :—The Principal Rules were published in ithe Gazette of India vide notification No. GSR 644(E), dajtied the 10th August, 1985 and subsequently amended vide notification—- (i) No. GSR 583(E), dated 18-6-1987. (ii) No. GSR 9 ( E ) , dated 6-1-1988. (iii) No. GSR 7 9 ( E ) , dated 4-2-19S8. (iv) No. GSR 324(E), dated 3-3-1988. (v) No. GSR 12O(E), dated 22-2-1989. (vi) No. GSR 417(E), darted 31-3-1989. (vii) No. GSR 72(E), dated 30-1-1992. (viii) No. GSR 41(E), dated 1-2-1993.
